t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Primary key. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Primary key. Allocated by Internal.GetPositionID_Bigint. Unique per position. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer ID - platform-internal primary key. Assigned at registration. Unique within etoro DB. Used as the universal customer identifier across all tables. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Group Customer ID - cross-product identity key linking the same person across eToro products/entities. NULL for older accounts predating GCID introduction. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Customer login username. Unique (case-insensitive, enforced via UserName_LOWER computed column index). Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: ETL-computed date int (YYYYMMDD) derived from OpenOccurred. E.g., 20260310. Used for date-range filtering. NOT a FK to Dim_Date by default.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: ETL-computed date int (YYYYMMDD) derived from OpenOccurred. E.g., 20260310. Used for date-range filtering. NOT a FK to Dim_Date by default. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: ETL-computed date int (YYYYMMDD) derived from CloseOccurred. 0=still open, 19000101=ETL transient state, YYYYMMDD=closed. **Partition column.** Always include in WHERE clause.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: ETL-computed date int (YYYYMMDD) derived from CloseOccurred. 0=still open, 19000101=ETL transient state, YYYYMMDD=closed. **Partition column.** Always include in WHERE clause. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: When position was persisted (mapped from Occurred in production). Default getutcdate().
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: When position was persisted (mapped from Occurred in production). Default getutcdate(). Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: When close was persisted.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: When close was persisted. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: FK to Trade.Instrument. Financial instrument being traded. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Asset class: 1=Currencies, 2=Commodities, 4=Indices. NULL for Stocks/ETF/Crypto (not mapped in Dealing_Islamic_Instruments_Groups). Passthrough from Dealing_Islamic_Instruments_Groups.instrument_type_id.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Instrument name (e.g., "EUR/USD", "GBP/USD"). From manual configuration.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Instrument name (e.g., "EUR/USD", "GBP/USD"). From manual configuration. NULL for Stocks/ETF/Crypto. Passthrough from Dealing_Islamic_Instruments_Groups.name.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Fee tier group (1-4). Maps to Dealing_Islamic_Admin_Fee_Per_Group.instrument_group for fee rate lookup.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Fee tier group (1-4). Maps to Dealing_Islamic_Admin_Fee_Per_Group.instrument_group for fee rate lookup. NULL for Stocks/ETF/Crypto. Passthrough from Dealing_Islamic_Instruments_Groups.instrument_group.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Number of instrument units in one standard contract. Used as divisor in commodity fee calculation. E.g., XTI=1000 barrels, XAG=5000 ounces.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Number of instrument units in one standard contract. Used as divisor in commodity fee calculation. E.g., XTI=1000 barrels, XAG=5000 ounces. NULL for non-commodity instruments. Passthrough from Dealing_Islamic_Units_Per_Contract.units_per_contract.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: 1 = Long/Buy (profit when price rises), 0 = Short/Sell.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: 1 = Long/Buy (profit when price rises), 0 = Short/Sell. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Leverage multiplier (1, 5, 10, etc.). Determines margin and settlement type.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Leverage multiplier (1, 5, 10, etc.). Determines margin and settlement type. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Raw bid price before spread adjustment. Mid-price reference. Compare to BidSpreaded to derive the spread.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Raw bid price before spread adjustment. Mid-price reference. Compare to BidSpreaded to derive the spread. Passthrough from Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Raw ask (offer) price before spread adjustment. Mid-price reference. Compare to AskSpreaded to derive the spread.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Raw ask (offer) price before spread adjustment. Mid-price reference. Compare to AskSpreaded to derive the spread. Passthrough from Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Pre-computed USD conversion rate for buy-side positions (IsBuy=1). Multiply by instrument price to convert to USD. Logic: if SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00; if BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/Bid; otherwise cross-rate. NULL where no cross-rate could be determined. Added 2023-02-26.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Pre-computed USD conversion rate for buy-side positions (IsBuy=1). Multiply by instrument price to convert to USD. Logic: if SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00; if BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/Bid; otherwise cross-rate. NULL where no cross-rate could be determined. Passthrough from Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Pre-computed USD conversion rate for sell-side positions (IsBuy=0). Multiply by instrument price to convert to USD. Logic: if SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00; if BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/Ask; otherwise cross-rate. NULL where no cross-rate could be determined. Added 2023-02-26.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Pre-computed USD conversion rate for sell-side positions (IsBuy=0). Multiply by instrument price to convert to USD. Logic: if SellCurrencyID=1 then 1.00; if BuyCurrencyID=1 then 1/Ask; otherwise cross-rate. NULL where no cross-rate could be determined. Passthrough from Fact_CurrencyPriceWithSplit.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Position size in units/shares. Fractional lots.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Position size in units/shares. Fractional lots. Passthrough from Dim_Position.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Administrative fee amount in USD. Applied per unit/contract/10K-USD-value depending on asset class. Ranges: $0.10 (Index group 3) to $80.00 (Currency group 4).
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Administrative fee amount in USD. Applied per unit/contract/10K-USD-value depending on asset class. Ranges: $0.10 (Index group 3) to $80.00 (Currency group 4). NULL for Stocks/ETF/Crypto without group mapping. Passthrough from Dealing_Islamic_Admin_Fee_Per_Group.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Number of trading days before fee starts. Currently 7 for all groups.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Number of trading days before fee starts. Currently 7 for all groups. Passthrough from Dealing_Islamic_Admin_Fee_Per_Group.grace_period.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Country of residence. FK to Dictionary.Country. Determines regulatory framework, available instruments, and leverage limits. Default=0. Passthrough from Dim_Customer.

issues.problem: Tagged Tier 2 (SP_Islamic_Administrative_Fee) but SP code shows `dp.CloseOccurred AS NewCloseOccurred` — a literal alias passthrough from Dim_Position. With Dim_Position wiki available, this should be Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl. The description itself acknowledges 'Currently identical to CloseOccurred (no transformation applied).'

Tagged Tier 2 (SP_Islamic_Administrative_Fee) but SP code shows `dp.IsSettled` — direct passthrough from Dim_Position. Upstream wiki exists and documents this column (as Tier 5 — Expert Review). Per tier rules, passthrough with upstream wiki present should be Tier 1, not Tier 2.

Tagged 'Tier 1 — Dim_Position' but the dim-lookup passthrough rule says NOT to use 'Tier 1 via Dim_X'. These are ETL-computed in Dim_Position (Tier 2 in the upstream wiki). The origin attribution is inconsistent with other columns that correctly trace to production origins (e.g., Trade.PositionTbl).

No explicit Phase Gate Checklist with P2/P3 checkboxes. Footer shows 'Phases: 11/14' but there is no way to verify which phases were completed or skipped. Data claims appear genuine but lack formal verification.

Placed in 'Group C: Fee Timing' but InstrumentTypeID is an instrument attribute (asset class identifier), not a fee timing column. Should logically be in 'Group D: Instrument Details' alongside InstrumentType, InstrumentName, etc.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: Minor fixes only: (1) Re-tag NewCloseOccurred as Tier 1 — Trade.PositionTbl (it is a literal alias passthrough). (2) Re-tag IsSettled as Tier 1 with appropriate upstream origin or note the Tier 5 uncertainty from Dim_Position. (3) Resolve OpenDateID/CloseDateID origin attribution — either use the dim's computation source or accept as Tier 2. (4) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section. (5) Move InstrumentTypeID from Group C to Group D.

skipped_phases: Phase Gate Checklist not present — cannot verify P2/P3 status
